extraction.one_line_summary: GANNA Filippo won the 14km opening ITT by 24 seconds over ASGREEN Kasper, with EVENEPOEL Remco third at 11 seconds and POGAČAR Tadej fourth.
tactical_patterns: GANNA Filippo zigzagged around manholes and nearly clipped barriers at the turnaround, prioritizing apex precision over smooth lines.
POGAČAR Tadej finished fourth after 49km solo at Strade Bianche two days prior, suggesting incomplete recovery or strategic conservation.
DOWSETT Alex held the hot seat for over two hours until ASGREEN Kasper displaced him, indicating early starters gained minimal advantage.

rider_signals.GANNA Filippo: positive: Dominated despite ungainly technique, 24-second margin on flat ITT suggests peak form entering stage race.
rider_signals.POGAČAR Tadej: neutral: Fourth place reasonable but clearly below specialist form, prioritizing GC positioning over stage hunting after Strade effort.
rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: positive: Second place and only 11 seconds down demonstrates ITT threat status despite GANNA's dominance.
rider_signals.ASGREEN Kasper: positive: Third overall and beat POGAČAR, confirming elite one-day form carries into stage racing TT efforts.
rider_signals.GEOGHEGAN HART Tao: neutral: 17 seconds down suggests team leadership unclear, setting internal benchmark against absent co-leaders.
rider_signals.DOWSETT Alex: positive: Fifth overall and sub-16 minutes as early starter reveals exceptional pacing without reference splits.
